name: Szechuan Shrimp (or Chicken)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Shrimp, shelled, half lengthwise, rinsed and patted dry
Chinese rice wine or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the shrimp mixture ingredients together and refrigerate for at least one hour.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the seasonings.
3. Heat 3 cups peanut oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Fry shrimp or chicken until golden brown. Remove from oil and place in a bowl.
4. Drain off most of the oil, leaving about 2 tablespoons. Add the seasonings and stir to combine.
5. Add the sauce ingredients and cook until bubbles form. Return the shrimp or chicken to the skillet and toss to coat.
6. Stir in sesame oil. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
7. Serve hot over rice. This recipe makes a lot of sauce, so feel free to double the ingredients if desired for milder heat.
